all.en: The three Wang siblings sat at the kitchen table for what Mom called a "family meeting."
all.zh: 王家三個兄弟姊妹坐在廚房餐桌前，參加媽媽所謂的「家庭會議」。

all.en: Mom had finally lost her patience with the constant arguing about household chores.
all.zh: 媽媽終於受不了他們一直為了家務事吵個不停。

all.en: "From now on, we're dividing the chores fairly," she announced, holding a list.
all.zh: 「從現在起，我們要公平地分配家務，」她拿著一張清單宣布。

all.en: Jason, the oldest, immediately said he should be excused because of his exams.
all.zh: 老大傑森立刻表示自己應該被免除，因為他要考試。

all.en: His sister Amy pointed out that he always had some kind of excuse ready.
all.zh: 妹妹艾咪指出他總是有藉口可以推託。

all.en: Little Ben, only ten years old, demanded the easiest task of all.
all.zh: 才十歲的小班則要求做最簡單的工作。

all.en: After thirty minutes of heated discussion, they finally reached a compromise.
all.zh: 經過三十分鐘的激烈討論，他們終於達成了妥協。

all.en: Jason agreed to take out the trash and walk the dog every evening after his study time.
all.zh: 傑森同意每天晚上讀書後負責倒垃圾和遛狗。

all.en: Amy would handle the dishes and laundry, since she actually enjoyed folding clothes.
all.zh: 艾咪負責洗碗和洗衣服，因為她其實還滿喜歡摺衣服的。

all.en: Ben got the job of feeding the goldfish and watering Mom's plants.
all.zh: 小班則負責餵金魚和澆媽媽的盆栽。

all.en: Mom posted the schedule on the fridge so nobody could pretend to forget.
all.zh: 媽媽把時程表貼在冰箱上，這樣誰都不能假裝忘記。

all.en: Surprisingly, the system worked well, and the house had never been so peaceful.
all.zh: 出乎意料地，這個制度運作良好，家裡從未如此平靜過。

all.en: By the end of the first week, Jason had only forgotten to walk the dog once.
all.zh: 第一週結束時，傑森只有一次忘記遛狗。

all.en: Mom marked his miss on the schedule with a bright red pen for everyone to see.
all.zh: 媽媽用鮮紅的筆在時程表上把他漏掉的那次圈起來，讓大家都看得到。

all.en: Amy started taking pride in her neatly folded laundry stacks on the shelf.
all.zh: 艾咪開始為自己摺得整齊的衣服感到自豪。

all.en: Little Ben surprised everyone by remembering to water the plants without being reminded.
all.zh: 小班讓大家驚訝的是，他不需提醒就會記得澆花。

all.en: After two weeks, Mom decided to introduce a small weekly allowance as a reward.
all.zh: 兩週後，媽媽決定加入每週小額零用錢當作獎勵。

all.en: The siblings cheered and immediately started planning what to do with their first earnings.
all.zh: 兄弟姊妹歡呼起來，馬上開始計畫第一筆收入要怎麼花。

all.en: Jason saved his money for a new pair of basketball shoes he had wanted for months.
all.zh: 傑森把錢存起來，買他想了好幾個月的籃球鞋。

all.en: Amy treated herself to a paperback novel from her favorite bookstore downtown.
all.zh: 艾咪犒賞自己，到市區喜歡的書店買了一本平裝小說。

all.en: Ben spent his entire allowance on a small plastic shark he saw at the corner store.
all.zh: 小班把全部零用錢花在街角商店看到的一隻塑膠小鯊魚上。

all.en: Mom realized that the chore system had taught her children more than just responsibility.
all.zh: 媽媽發現，這套家務制度教給孩子的不只是責任而已。

all.en: After a month, the siblings barely needed Mom's reminders to keep their schedules running smoothly.
all.zh: 一個月後，兄弟姊妹幾乎不再需要媽媽的提醒就能讓時程運作順利。

all.en: Jason even started preparing a healthy breakfast on Sundays, much to everyone's surprise.
all.zh: 傑森甚至開始在週日準備健康早餐，讓大家都很驚訝。

all.en: Amy began ironing her own school uniform, claiming the smell of fresh fabric helped her focus.
all.zh: 艾咪開始自己燙校服，說新鮮布料的味道有助於她專心。

all.en: Little Ben proudly added "sweeping the porch" to his list, asking for a few extra coins.
all.zh: 小班自豪地把「掃前廊」加進他的清單，並要求多幾個銅板。

all.en: Dad noticed the change too, and started involving the kids in larger weekend household projects.
all.zh: 爸爸也注意到這個改變，開始讓孩子們參與週末較大的居家工程。

all.en: One Saturday, the four of them painted the living room a fresh shade of light blue together.
all.zh: 某個星期六，他們四人一起把客廳漆成清新的淺藍色。

all.en: Ben dripped paint on his shoes, but everyone laughed instead of scolding him.
all.zh: 小班把油漆滴到鞋子上，但大家都笑了笑，沒有責備他。

all.en: Jason discovered that he actually enjoyed teamwork far more than complaining about chores.
all.zh: 傑森發現比起抱怨做家事，自己其實更享受團隊合作。

all.en: Amy began suggesting weekly themes, like "green Wednesday" for recycling and saving electricity.
all.zh: 艾咪開始提議每週主題，例如「綠色星期三」做資源回收和省電。

all.en: Mom realized her family had grown closer through nothing more than a fair list on the fridge.
all.zh: 媽媽體會到，她的家庭因為冰箱上一張公平的清單，變得更加親近。

all.en: As the seasons changed, the Wang siblings decided to start a small vegetable garden together.
all.zh: 季節轉換時，王家兄弟姊妹決定一起經營一個小菜園。

all.en: Jason researched which plants would grow well in their region during the cooler months.
all.zh: 傑森研究在他們這個地區較冷的月份哪些植物比較好種。

all.en: Amy designed neat row labels and even painted them with watercolors during the weekend.
all.zh: 艾咪設計了整齊的標籤，週末還用水彩把它們畫得很漂亮。

all.en: Little Ben proudly planted radish seeds and checked the soil moisture every single morning.
all.zh: 小班自豪地種下蘿蔔種子，每天早上都會檢查土壤的濕度。

all.en: Mom added "watering the garden" to the schedule on the fridge so everyone could help out.
all.zh: 媽媽把「澆菜園」加進冰箱上的時程表，讓大家都能幫忙。

all.en: Dad built a small wooden fence to keep neighborhood cats from digging up the young plants.
all.zh: 爸爸搭了一道小木籬笆，防止社區的貓把幼苗挖出來。

all.en: Within six weeks, they harvested fresh lettuce, cherry tomatoes, and several plump radishes.
all.zh: 短短六週後，他們就收成了新鮮萵苣、小番茄和好幾顆飽滿的蘿蔔。

all.en: Mom used the vegetables to prepare a colorful salad that everyone proudly ate during dinner.
all.zh: 媽媽用這些蔬菜做了一盤色彩繽紛的沙拉，全家人在晚餐時驕傲地享用。

all.en: Ben told his classmates at school about the garden, and three of them came over to visit.
all.zh: 小班在學校跟同學分享菜園的事，其中三位同學還過來參觀。

all.en: The family realized that working together outdoors had become their favorite shared activity.
all.zh: 全家人發現一起在戶外勞動已經成為他們最喜歡的共同活動。

all.en: As winter approached, the Wang siblings planned what to grow next in their successful little garden.
all.zh: 冬天接近時，王家兄弟姊妹開始計畫在他們成功的小菜園裡接著種些什麼。

all.en: Jason suggested they try growing cold-weather greens like spinach, kale, and Chinese cabbage.
all.zh: 傑森建議他們嘗試種一些耐冷的綠葉蔬菜，像菠菜、羽衣甘藍和大白菜。

all.en: Amy painted brand new winter labels and added a small snowflake design to each wooden stake.
all.zh: 艾咪畫了全新的冬季標籤，並在每根木樁上加了一個小雪花圖案。

all.en: Little Ben asked Dad to build a small plastic cover to protect the seedlings from the cold wind.
all.zh: 小班請爸爸搭一個小型塑膠罩，保護幼苗不被冷風吹壞。

all.en: Mom turned the chore schedule into a colorful seasonal chart that hung proudly on the fridge.
all.zh: 媽媽把家務時程表改成色彩繽紛的季節表，得意地掛在冰箱上。

all.en: Jason started cooking a weekly Sunday soup using only vegetables harvested from their own garden.
all.zh: 傑森開始每週日用自家菜園收成的蔬菜煮一鍋湯。

all.en: Amy invited two classmates over to admire the garden and share warm tea in the kitchen afterward.
all.zh: 艾咪邀請兩位同學來欣賞菜園，事後一起在廚房喝熱茶。

all.en: Ben proudly demonstrated how to test soil moisture using a finger and a small wooden ruler.
all.zh: 小班自豪地示範如何用手指和一把小木尺檢測土壤濕度。

all.en: Dad surprised everyone with new gardening gloves embroidered with each child's name in bright thread.
all.zh: 爸爸出其不意地送給每個孩子一副新園藝手套，上面用鮮豔的線繡了名字。

all.en: Mom realized that what had begun as a fight over chores had blossomed into a family love story.
all.zh: 媽媽體會到，當初為了家務的爭吵，如今已綻放成一段家庭的愛之故事。

all.en: By the next spring, the family garden produced enough vegetables to share with three nearby households.
all.zh: 到了隔年春天，家裡的花園長出的蔬菜多到可以分送給附近三戶人家。

all.en: Amy started a small notebook to track which neighbors enjoyed tomatoes and which preferred fresh basil.
all.zh: 艾咪開始用一本小筆記本記錄哪些鄰居喜歡番茄、哪些偏愛新鮮羅勒。

all.en: Ben designed a wooden delivery box and proudly painted the family name across its lid in bright blue.
all.zh: 班設計了一個木製送菜箱，得意地用亮藍色把家族姓氏漆在蓋子上。

all.en: Mom suggested charging neighbors only with kind words or homemade returns, never with actual money.
all.zh: 媽媽建議向鄰居只收取善意的話語或自製回禮，絕對不收現金。

all.en: Soon, the family received jars of jam, fresh bread, and one beautifully knitted scarf from a kind grandma.
all.zh: 很快地，他們收到了好幾罐果醬、新鮮麵包，還有一位慈祥奶奶手織的漂亮圍巾。

all.en: Dad turned an empty corner of the garden into a small bench area where neighbors could rest and chat.
all.zh: 爸爸把花園裡一個空角落改造成小長椅區，讓鄰居可以坐下休息聊天。

all.en: Amy and Ben began hosting Saturday garden tours, leading younger kids through every herb and vegetable bed.
all.zh: 艾咪和班開始在週六舉辦花園導覽，帶著小朋友參觀每一個香草和蔬菜苗圃。

all.en: The local school principal heard about it and asked whether students could visit on a learning trip.
all.zh: 當地校長聽說了這件事，詢問學生們是否可以前來進行學習參訪。

all.en: Mom agreed warmly, and twenty kindergarteners arrived the following month with curious eyes and tiny notebooks.
all.zh: 媽媽熱情地答應，隔月就有二十位幼稚園小朋友帶著好奇的眼神和小筆記本前來參觀。

all.en: That night, the family laughed together, realizing the chore negotiation had quietly become a neighborhood treasure.
all.zh: 那晚，全家一起大笑，發現那場家事談判已經悄悄變成整條社區的寶藏。

all.en: The kindergarten visit ended with each child carrying a small pot of basil seedlings back to school.
all.zh: 幼稚園的參訪結束時，每個孩子都帶著一小盆羅勒幼苗回到學校。

all.en: Their teacher emailed photos of the seedlings two weeks later, growing strong on every classroom windowsill.
all.zh: 兩週後，老師寄來照片，那些幼苗已在每扇教室窗台上長得茁壯。

all.en: Inspired by the success, Jason proposed running monthly weekend workshops to teach families to start home gardens.
all.zh: 受到成功啟發，傑森提議每月舉辦週末工作坊，教家庭如何在家種菜。

all.en: Amy designed colorful flyers and slipped one into every mailbox along their quiet residential street.
all.zh: 艾咪設計了色彩繽紛的傳單，挨家挨戶塞進他們安靜住宅街上每個信箱。

all.en: On the day of the first workshop, eight families arrived, each carrying a small empty pot of their own.
all.zh: 第一場工作坊那天，八個家庭來訪，每戶都帶著一個自己的小空花盆。

all.en: Ben demonstrated the soil moisture test confidently, surprising adults with his calm and clear explanations.
all.zh: 班自信地示範土壤濕度測試，他冷靜清晰的解說讓大人們都感到驚訝。

all.en: Jason taught participants how to schedule chores so gardening would never feel like an extra burden.
all.zh: 傑森教參加者如何安排家務時程，讓園藝不會變成額外的負擔。

all.en: Amy handed out small notebooks with hand-drawn seasonal charts so each family could plan their own garden.
all.zh: 艾咪發送小型筆記本，裡面有手繪的季節圖表，讓每個家庭都能規劃自己的花園。

all.en: Mom served warm ginger tea and salad made from their winter harvest, charming every visitor at once.
all.zh: 媽媽端出溫熱的薑茶和用冬季收成做的沙拉，立刻擄獲了每位來訪者的心。

all.en: By the end of the year, fifteen homes on their street had thriving gardens, all traced back to one chore meeting.
all.zh: 年底時，他們街上有十五戶人家擁有蓬勃的菜園，源頭都能追溯到那一場家事會議。

all.en: On New Year's Eve, all fifteen families gathered in the Wang backyard to celebrate the year of growth.
all.zh: 除夕當晚，十五個家庭齊聚王家的後院，慶祝這一年的成長。

all.en: Jason organized a small cooking competition using only vegetables harvested from the various neighborhood gardens.
all.zh: 傑森籌辦了一場小型廚藝比賽，規則是只能使用社區各家菜園所收成的蔬菜。

all.en: Amy decorated the yard with paper lanterns and string lights, transforming it into a warm winter wonderland.
all.zh: 艾咪用紙燈籠和燈串裝飾院子，把它變成一座溫暖的冬季仙境。

all.en: Little Ben led a tour of the original family garden, proudly showing visitors how it had quietly started everything.
all.zh: 小班帶領大家參觀最初的家庭花園，得意地向訪客介紹這一切是如何悄悄開始的。

all.en: Dad set up an outdoor projector to play a slideshow of every workshop, harvest, and neighborhood gathering.
all.zh: 爸爸架起了戶外投影機，放映每一場工作坊、收成和鄰里聚會的幻燈片。

all.en: Mom served a giant pot of warm soup made from contributions from every garden in the neighborhood.
all.zh: 媽媽端出一大鍋熱湯，食材由社區裡每一座菜園貢獻而來。

all.en: Several neighbors gave short speeches, thanking the family for sparking a quiet revolution on their street.
all.zh: 好幾位鄰居致詞，感謝這家人在街上引發了一場安靜的革命。

all.en: Jason announced that proceeds from selling extra produce would fund a new community greenhouse next spring.
all.zh: 傑森宣布，多餘蔬果的銷售收入將資助明年春天興建一座新的社區溫室。

all.en: Amy presented a hand-bound book containing photos and stories from every family on the street.
all.zh: 艾咪呈上一本手工裝訂的書，裡面收錄了街上每個家庭的照片與故事。

all.en: As midnight approached, the entire neighborhood counted down together, holding seedling pots like tiny torches of hope.
all.zh: 午夜將至時，整個社區一起倒數，捧著幼苗盆，宛如一盞盞小小的希望火炬。

all.en: On New Year's Day, Mom found three different jars of homemade jam left anonymously outside their front gate.
all.zh: 元旦那天，媽媽在他們家大門外發現三罐匿名留下的自製果醬。

all.en: Little Ben volunteered to deliver thank-you notes to every house on the street, even though he could not read all the names yet.
all.zh: 小班自願送感謝卡到街上每一戶人家，雖然有些名字他還看不懂。

all.en: Amy started a weekly garden newsletter on cheap photocopier paper, with hand-drawn carrots in the corner of every page.
all.zh: 艾咪開始用便宜的影印紙做每週園藝快訊，每一頁角落都有她手繪的紅蘿蔔。

all.en: Jason tried planting a chilli pepper variety from a neighbor's seed packet, and one tiny sprout poked up within four days.
all.zh: 傑森試著種鄰居送的辣椒種子，短短四天就冒出一棵小小的嫩芽。

all.en: Dad replaced the original wooden fence with a slightly taller one, after one particularly bold neighborhood cat almost reached the lettuce.
all.zh: 爸爸把原本的木籬笆換成稍微高一點的款式，因為有隻特別大膽的社區貓差點碰到萵苣了。

all.en: Mom hosted a Saturday morning seed-swap session, and seven families brought small envelopes with carefully labeled handwritten contents.
all.zh: 媽媽辦了一場週六早晨的種子交換會，七戶人家帶來小信封，內容物都仔細地手寫標示。

all.en: Ben argued with Jason for nearly an hour over whose row of radishes had grown faster, before Mom measured them with a tape measure.
all.zh: 小班為了誰種的蘿蔔長得快和傑森爭了快一個小時，最後媽媽拿捲尺實際量了一次。

all.en: Amy's hand-drawn seasonal charts were laminated and clipped to the fridge door, finally retiring the old paper schedule that had started everything.
all.zh: 艾咪手繪的季節表被護貝後夾在冰箱門上，那張開啟一切的舊紙本時程表終於功成身退。

all.en: Mom secretly tucked the original schedule into a memory drawer beside Grandma's old recipes, knowing some pieces of paper held entire stories.
all.zh: 媽媽偷偷把那張原始時程表收進回憶抽屜，和奶奶的舊食譜放在一起，因為有些紙張其實裝著整段故事。

all.en: Before bed on the first day of spring, Little Ben whispered to his lettuce sprouts that he hoped this year would be even kinder than the last.
all.zh: 立春那晚睡前，小班對著萵苣幼苗悄悄說，希望這一年會比去年更溫柔一些。
